overrides.author: Jack
overrides.text: From Jack: Mexico USGS volcano deployment (350-4) is DELAYED to Fall 2026. Not departing April 20. No flight planning, no shipping, no mission prep imminent. Any Asana tasks referencing an April deployment are stale - ignore them.
